title: 💳 Setup Stripe Integration
description:
## What
Set up Stripe payment processing integration.

## Steps
1. Create Stripe account (if not already done)
2. Get API keys from Stripe dashboard
3. Configure environment variables
4. Integrate Stripe SDK into application
5. Set up webhook handlers
6. Test payment flow end-to-end

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Stripe account configured
- [ ] API keys stored securely in .env
- [ ] Stripe SDK integrated
- [ ] Webhook endpoints created and verified
- [ ] Test payment succeeds
- [ ] Error handling for failed payments implemented
